PROP-01b-partial-inv-002.text: Flash-loan pattern: asset transferred to bidder before assetOut pulled from bidder.
PROP-01b-partial-inv-002.assertion: forall bid(): transfer(asset, bidder) happens-before transferFrom(bidder, assetOut)

locations.note: safeTransfer to bidder then optional callback then safeTransferFrom — ordering is security-critical
